title: eremogone kingii var. kingii
intro: Eremogone kingii var. kingii, also known as King's Crown or Queen of the Mountain, is a flowering plant in the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). It is a perennial herb that grows in mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eremogone kingii var. kingii is used to prepare herbal remedies to alleviate various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin irritations, and is often available in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves.
